textByHash.007eb7511e0863334a6734df559e24f62b016529: The plague is a lie? What do you mean the plague is a lie?
textByHash.0110ba9f7cb47ff14d4e6bf1cdc64a8d211a1126: Elena's a healer. Three weeks ago she managed to cross the wall into West Ardougne. No one's allowed to cross the wall in case they spread the plague.
textByHash.02a27933757037a44ca33610d2c52445d915f93d: I've got to find my daughter. I pray that she is still alive...
textByHash.05d6a065a38ff4bd7d2afc4e3375f0b281fd2c7a: I can't let you enter the city without your gas mask on.
textByHash.08be493625725984b1adf6f8c157ca967e57a5cd: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you
textByHash.0a910fb88616a40b292004d247a835cdd6e73bad: She's had to go into hiding to avoid recapture. She asked me to pass on the location though. It's the Rehnison household in West Ardougne.
textByHash.0bf455cd66df233c47476f92831a06c2608184ca: Have you got the dwellberries yet?
textByHash.104774d21c20c9d095c97e7d96ea6b99a55bdd25: That's great, it should be soft enough to dig through now. There should be a spade nearby that you can use.
textByHash.123cfbd0bc01ad253a4811850a9ca0691b590048: So would you like to buy one?
textByHash.1a2c23718efd6ad12359d68a788b07eb5aa60b19: If you get some rope you could tie to the grill, then we could both pull it at the same time.
textByHash.1d1b993291768dfcb215bd1cf831b8e1be743492: Thank you for telling me the truth . I just wish you had told me sooner.
textByHash.1f98acd49c82f88995d4c3b2f25dc10b70c156bf: Once you're in the city look for a man called Jethick. He's an old friend of the family. Hopefully he can help you.
textByHash.20dacfbe60448a88d1412cedcfaf590a5e3c0e9c: But that doesn't make any sense. Why not just tell the truth? Why lie to everyone and make up a plague? Something doesn't seem right about it all.
textByHash.2779bbc42a0bae817fd98b1d206dc3c775fbb356: There should be a picture of Elena in the house. Please find her quickly, I hope it's not too late.
textByHash.29d6e47ed6af1d0fcf2482b7dcf018ee9f2a9592: Now I'd recommend you go and see Elena. She'll want to thank you herself. She lives in the house opposite ours.
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.3a95ac58d1ede2b48ae73c689e4c39fdc822aa29: The only place I know of is McGrubor's Wood, just west of Seers' Village. The berries are bright blue so they're easy to spot.
textByHash.419cb41a14621b3b3d7bc40c7a686a3245ee00af: A threat? But she's no danger to anyone. Why does he think that way?
textByHash.41e25da827483253827f6959acbd2b2b925fc4ad: Just when I thought this story couldn't get any worse. The king is evil? Why?
textByHash.45a61b3d36af49543f7a9fac696a0538e5bb29a1: My wife should be able to help you with the tabard. You'll have to check with her to see what she needs for it. Come back to me once you have everything and we'll discuss what to do next.
textByHash.45f89d7ae7f0b93372f8e6758a13f2066ee89bb4: I've already tried digging down to them but the soil is rock hard. You'll need to pour on several buckets of water to soften it up. I reckon four buckets should do it.
textByHash.4808fc72547fdf3e7e5bf395c2011a31f6ec41b6: Well if you hear anything about Elena please tell me.
textByHash.5e08f8239d8205459c166a9fe820e770ff9d2a9c: Take your disguise and head down to the prison to see what you can find out. You'll find it beneath the castle.
textByHash.61dfd8853b7c5748bfac2e97aa5a078b49d0a7e7: Is there anything you can do to help us? It feels wrong to ask given what you've done for us before, but we're desperate.
textByHash.65547a4b3bb24341cf03423888c331a62ae2a04c: They help to repel the plague apparently. We need some more though...
textByHash.68a567e729a92513f4bdbe0667e0ccbb5cd6a075: Excellent, let's have a look at it.
textByHash.6febab4da88a870727dad79f62731c22044b1fc5: You'll need to get a steel platebody, some steel platelegs and a steel full helm. The plume on the helm will need dying red and you'll need a tabard for the platebody.
textByHash.74ab9aeea55dbb8e183f34cd0ca0484c68371a5c: If you're going into West Ardougne you'll need protection from the plague. My wife made a special gas mask for Elena with dwellberries rubbed into it.
textByHash.7709d2a5bdaa7f9406a7f43eacfc43748fcc17c8: I do. They're holding Elena in the city prison beneath the castle. You'll need to disguise yourself as a Knight of Ardougne, infiltrate the prison and find a way to free her.
textByHash.7b8619c6107f1d2f1f2ac2ade84f653abdb11cec: Goodness me Elena, what have you gotten yourself into?
textByHash.87356f90ff3e4df8064d2abc027580638df0c7d7: They say the plague is a horrible way to go... That's why Elena felt she had to go help. She said she'd be gone for a few days but we've heard nothing since.
textByHash.91b403db5a064255b1a0f734135936aba0009f23: Take them to my wife Alrena, she's inside.
textByHash.97b036537844cbfb9df28e595b803f42b8249dc6: Sorry, I can't stop to talk...
textByHash.9867016ef070edf7063ed524d35557cbca3f8e1d: The foresters keep a close eye on it, but there is a back way in.
textByHash.a223ff2aecf17b5aa55ec8cfa5e5bc09dab0f2d3: There you go. Now get yourself down to the prison and see if you can find a way to free Elena. You'll find it beneath the castle.
textByHash.a3db4020d4fdb6785058eae949a9886e85bc412e: I hope it's not too late.
textByHash.a40c1aca8cacc9931a665f874e1045d06509992d: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.
textByHash.a9d74092658630e7756901d5db0d76474bdcd292: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?
textByHash.aac0ce96ba6a44b496b4196f76bd781b67b71f0b: Really, would you? I've been working on a plan to get into West Ardougne, but I'm too old and tired to carry it through. But you on the other hand, you should have no problem.
textByHash.ac19b7556ab6a83b5fb83551614a020537310264: Elves? I wasn't even sure they existed anymore.
textByHash.af5b2912a78bdc4afc6a6f8d13dc5b668a20bf92: An elven civil war? I'm going to need a drink after all of this. So what happened next?
textByHash.b02b113e1b1fa0f75942ccf79b2acfdd6628889f: I see, this still doesn't explain why the plague was made up though.
textByHash.b0cdbc71eff634b998cb10fb2c9b64ac5988281d: Ah hello. Thank you again for rescuing my daughter.
textByHash.b2831657913090ee4b21125754c467cb039c63be: Is that your final answer? Because it sounds unlikely to me.
textByHash.b38e53de93f28975b09405d3bf0b240d3059d419: She's had to go into hiding to avoid recapture. She's hiding out at the Rehnison household in West Ardougne.
textByHash.bb6447f0c360a7b220450f9887ab16b76a2d9bea: I know, she already came by to let us know. Thank you so much for your help.
textByHash.c509eb5944cd32ce383dbe451fe302d23697b219: Well you definitely look the part. Those guards will be totally fooled. Now get yourself down to the prison and see if you can find a way to free Elena. You'll find it beneath the castle.
textByHash.cae93c2a0c5d03d303377b3a1a98cb35c0a3f983: Not that long ago, West Ardougne was hit by a deadly plague. They had the wall built to try and keep it contained. No one is allowed to enter the city now apart from the mourners.
textByHash.ccf08d5a8dcc7126637f2112632d4b396b6ef23a: As much as I hate to admit it, I'm far too old to pass as a knight. It will have to be you.
textByHash.cff78460a423f4c3d0999aeea7eccaa71a2b5328: Yes, I do as a matter of fact.
textByHash.d127fc1c2e95f84e952c4f3fe3b26e18f2979d96: Hello there friend. I hope you're looking after Elena out there.
textByHash.d17a96a11eeaa1cecf7c56dbb3899572c86430c8: Good stuff, now for the digging. Beneath us are the Ardougne sewers. I've done some research, and I reckon you can use them to enter West Ardougne.
textByHash.dce249a6f0fa9521718e0616b13b3f6654f4e757: Yes, this should be perfect. Those platelegs are a bit dirty though, let me give them a polish for you.
textByHash.dfe71507bcd549c14c358bc34d09d7e1b54c98a1: Thank you, thank you! Elena beat you back by minutes. Now I said I'd give you a reward. What can I give you as a reward I wonder? Here take this magic scroll, I have little use for it but it may help you.
textByHash.e0fa67743b6611fbe8f8a975e152bd2229c0a952: Not good at all my friend. It's Elena, she's been taken...
textByHash.e4d5c592f7409da17d9a777f26a3b183519f940b: I think it's the pipe to the south that comes up in West Ardougne.
textByHash.e5597ddd1144fa21449309dba733f895c73b0294: All of this, just because Lathas wants more land? What about this Lord Iorwerth, what's in it for him?
textByHash.e5cc4b266fbef1794f9b558d2285cf4371e9f2fc: If even half of what you say about King Lathas is true, then my daughter is in great danger. We need to help her.
textByHash.ebb825baf97fbe044e027677c9881d439b796a7c: You need to disguise yourself as a Knight of Ardougne. Get yourself a steel platebody, some steel platelegs and a steel full helm. The plume on the helm will need dying red and you'll need a tabard for the platebody.
textByHash.ec1a9b2b54f90b26134fdbcfe117c987d4d46518: Hello there. Have you spoken to the king yet?
textByHash.f6c9d050a430b1ce8d95e6a9b5bb0420c1a7035c: But why? I know all this plague business has got her a bit emotional, but can't he see that she's just upset?
textByHash.f8191e726e483261c5eda3db6fc6fe4a64ce90ca: You'll probably find them in McGrubor's Wood, just west of Seers' Village. The berries are bright blue so they're easy to spot.
textByHash.fa5bafbec75066564ce36fbb698337a692a3d057: The Knights of Ardougne. They claimed she was inciting rebellion against the king. Apparently she's been going around telling people that the plague isn't real...
textByHash.fc25a4ee45ac803b1659dc11b3d86b80388414a1: Yes, this should be perfect. Those guards will be totally fooled. Now get yourself down to the prison and see if you can find a way to free Elena. You'll find it beneath the castle.
